name: cost-of-ownership
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). STATE-backed TCO rollup. Requires a vehicleId that resolves to a vehicle owned by ctx.actor.userId — an unknown id is REJECTED (fail-CLOSED; a fresh assassin ctx owns no vehicles, so every fuzz case here correctly returns ok:false). depreciation = max(0, purchasePrice - salvageValue) only when purchasePrice>0; poisoned '1e999'/'NaN' → Math.max(0, Number||0) → 0, never negative/NaN. operatingCost sums the real expense ledger; byCategory is the per-category breakdown. costPerMile is null (not a fake 0) when no miles tracked. Degrade-graceful when STATE absent. Pinned by server/tests/automotive-lens-macros.test.js.
